```mjs title=main.mjs
import * as _rspack_external_fs from "fs";
import * as lib2_ns from "fs";
import { readFile as external_fs_readFile } from "fs";

// fs?f137

// ./lib.js


// fs?303b

// ./lib2.js



// ./index.js



it('should not have duplicate import identifiers', async () => {
	expect(external_fs_readFile).toBeDefined()
	expect(lib2_ns).toBeDefined()
	expect(lib2_ns.readFile).toBe(external_fs_readFile)
})

export {};

```
